dialogos.texto_en: Oh, there you are.\nCan I talk to you guys for a sec?
Hey, what's up?
I wanted to ask you something.
What's up?
I'm kinda curious,\nbut where did you guys end up yesterday?
Hm? Why do you ask?
Well, you all gave Itsuki and I free time together, right?\nI appreciated it, but did you guys have any fun?
Cause it ended up being like we were left on a date.
Yeah, that's right.
So, he didn't notice after all, huh.
Huh?
It's nothing.\nWe just wandered around.\nLike at the American Village and so on.
American Village?\nWe went there too.
Really?\nGood thing we didn't bump into each other.\nIt would've been awkward.
Well, don't worry about it.\nWe all had a good time, Raiha-chan too.
Oh, Raiha was with you guys too?
Ah, yeah, we ended up being a group of five.\nIt just kinda happened.
I see.\nWell, that's good then.
Thanks for making time for us.\nI was able to talk to Itsuki properly because of that.
If we hadn't had that time,\nI think we would've been frustrated with each other.\nIt really helped us out.
You're welcome.\nBut you're surprisingly honest.
That's because Itsuki-chan\nis that important to you, right, Futaro-kun?
W-well, that's...
Fu-kun, you always get so embaressed when trying\nto deny something.
But, don't forget that you made Itsuki cry.
...What? I made her cry?\nW-wait, wh-wh-what do you mean?
Ah, you didn't realize?
The night before yesterday,\nwhen you went for a walk at night,\nItsuki-chan came back to the room, well, a little upset.
(Two nights ago?\n That was when we went to Umikaji Terrace...\n and she ran off. Wait, she was crying?!)
(I was worried that she was angry\n or hated me or something,\n but...I didn't think it was that bad...)
What exactly did you do to Itsuki?\nDepending on your answer... \nyou better prepare yourself.
W-well...
I-I don't have to say anything!
Hmm?\nSo that means you did something\nyou can't talk about?
Th-that's not it...
Then, confess.
Well, it's related to Itsuki,\nso I can't speak on her behalf!
...Heheh!\nYou don't have to be so flustered,\nit's just a little joke.
Yeah, Nino isn't really angry either.
H-hey!\nDid Itsuki really cry?\nWhat was her expression like?
She wasn't really bawling or anything.\nJust teary-eyed.
...But she was crying, right?
Can't deny that point.
I hadn't even done anything yet...
Yet?
N-no!\nI mean...we're in a relationship,\nso eventually, right?!
Ahaha!\nFutaro-kun, you're getting too flustered!\nIt's not like Nino's really angry about it.
...Is that so?
Yes, I was making fun of you a little.\nYou just react so well.
H-hey!\nDid Itsuki really cry?\nWhat was her expression like?
She wasn't really bawling or anything.\nJust teary-eyed.
...But she was crying, right?
Can't deny that point.
I'll take an oath of silence.
Oh, how confident you are.
It's not just my secret.\nIt's related to Itsuki's honor too.
Well, that's fine then.\nYou don't have to say anything.
Futaro-kun,\nItsuki-chan really means a lot to you,\ndoesn't she.
H-hey!\nDid Itsuki really cry?\nWhat was her expression like?
She wasn't really bawling or anything.\nJust teary-eyed.
...But she was crying, right?
Can't deny that point.
(I messed up that much, huh...)
It's understandable that you're feeling down.
I do feel down...
But, you talked about it\nwith Itsuki-chan properly, right?
Yeah.\nWe both said what was on our minds.
Then, maybe it's okay to consider it resolved,\nis what I think.
The fact remains that I made her cry.\nNo matter how you look at it, it can't be erased.
Ichika, Nino.\nI swear to you that I will never make Itsuki cry again.\nPlease trust me.
Huh...
I mean, I know it's strange to promise such a thing...\nbut anyway, I'll do my absolute best\nto not make your precious little sister sad.
Fu-kun, you're such a wimp.\nYou should make a proper decision at times like this.
Nino?
Yeah, yeah, I got it.\nIt's in your hands.
We're counting on you to take good care of Itsuki-chan,\nFutaro-kun.
